TV Series.title: Hoarders
TV Series.overview: This series delves into the mental disorder of hoarding, as experts work to help individuals overcome obsessive collecting and reclaim their lives.

TV Series.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
TV Series.overview: Karl Pilkington shares his curious views as Ricky Gervais and Stephen Merchant riff on them hilariously in this animated adaptation of the hit podcast.

TV Series.title: Toriko
TV Series.overview: The world is full of deliciously deadly ingredients that the wealthiest appetites in existence can't wait to devour. Toriko, the legendary Gourmet Hunter, is ready and willing to track down the rarest animals on the planet and put them on a plate!

TV Series.title: Phantom Lawyer
TV Series.overview: Possessed lawyer hunts the truth behind eerie cases to deliver thrilling justice for the vengeful dead!

TV Series.title: That Night
TV Series.overview: When a young, naïve single mother gets embroiled in a murder during an island getaway, her sisters rush to help. But they only make things worse.

TV Series.title: This Is Us
TV Series.overview: Follows the Pearson family through decades and three generations, touching upon their triumphs, struggles, loves, losses, and more.

TV Series.title: Boruto: Naruto Next Generations
TV Series.overview: The life of the shinobi is beginning to change. Boruto Uzumaki, son of Seventh Hokage Naruto Uzumaki, has enrolled in the Ninja Academy to learn the ways of the ninja. Now, as a series of mysterious events unfolds, Boruto’s story is about to begin!

TV Series.title: Bitten
TV Series.overview: 25-year-old Elena Michaels is desperate for a normal human life. But things have been complicated since she became the world’s only female werewolf.

TV Series.title: One-Punch Man
TV Series.overview: The most powerful superhero in the world can kill anyone with one blow. But nothing can challenge him, so he struggles with ennui and depression.

TV Series.title: The Office Movers
TV Series.overview: Held together with packing tape and a dream, two brothers reluctantly start an office-moving business, intending to build it, sell it and cash out.

Movies.title: Spiral: From the Book of Saw
Movies.overview: A criminal mastermind unleashes a twisted form of justice in this terrifying new chapter from the book of SAW, starring Chris Rock, Max Minghella, and Samuel L. Jackson.

Movies.title: The Rise of the Red Hot Chili Peppers: Our Brother, Hillel
The Creator
Movies.overview: As a future war between the human race and artificial intelligence rages on, ex-special forces agent Joshua is recruited to hunt down and kill the Creator, the elusive architect of advanced AI. The Creator has developed a mysterious weapon that has the power to end the war and all of mankind. As Joshua and his team of elite operatives venture into enemy-occupied territory, they soon discover the w

Movies.title: In a Relationship
Movies.overview: Over the course of a summer in LA, steadfast couple Owen and Hallie stare down the end of their relationship while Matt and Willa are just beginning.

Movies.title: Small Time Crooks
Movies.overview: A bungling ex-con and dishwasher and his wife strike it rich when a botched bank heist's cover business next door becomes a spectacular success.

Movies.title: The Bad Guardian
Movies.overview: A dedicated daughter must find the strength to save her father from the clutches of a corrupt and greedy court-appointed "guardian.”

Movies.title: The Plastic Detox
Movies.overview: This eye-opening documentary follows six couples with unexplained infertility as they lower their exposure to plastics in hopes it helps them conceive.

Movies.title: There There
Movies.overview: Through fleeting connection and confronting isolation, seven people search for meaning in their modern, intertwining relationships.

Movies.title: Vengeance
Movies.overview: A journalist travels from New York City to West Texas to investigate his ex-girlfriend’s death while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.

Movies.title: BlackBerry
Movies.overview: The riveting true story of the meteoric rise and catastrophic demise of the world's first smartphone, BlackBerry is a whirlwind ride through the ruthlessly competitive forces of Silicon Valley at breakneck speeds.

Movies.title: Gaslit by My Husband: The Morgan Metzer Story
Movies.overview: Morgan and Rodney were childhood sweethearts and married young. The couple separates, and Morgan's life begins to turn around, until Rodney gets diagnosed with cancer.

Movies.title: Nobody 2
Movies.overview: Bob Odenkirk returns as Hutch, an overworked assassin who just needs a break, in this bare-knuckle action-thriller. After deciding to take his family to a tourist town for some fun in the sun, a minor encounter with local bullies yanks the family into the crosshairs of an unhinged, blood-thirsty crime boss who is determined to derail his relaxation.

Movies.title: Agnes
Movies.overview: Rumors of demonic possession at a religious convent prompts a church investigation into the strange goings-on among its nuns. A disaffected priest and his neophyte are confronted with temptation, bloodshed and a crisis of faith.

Movies.title: Raazi
Movies.overview: Set in 1971, when the winds of war were blowing between India and Pakistan, Raazi – an adaptation of Harinder Sikka’s novel “Calling Sehmat” – is a true-life story involving a 20 year old Kashmiri girl.

Movies.title: A Miracle
Movies.overview: A young woman who claims she can heal the sick after seeing the Virgin Mary becomes a source of devotion and derision as believers flock to her.

Movies.title: The Walk
Movies.overview: In 1974, French high-wire artist Philippe Petit risks everything to walk between the Twin Towers, turning a dream into a breathtaking reality.

Movies.title: The Retirement Plan
Movies.overview: When Ashley and her daughter Sarah get caught up in a criminal enterprise that puts them at risk, she turns to the only person who can help: her estranged father Matt (Nicholas Cage). As Ashley, Sarah, and Matt become entangled in an increasingly dangerous web, Ashley quickly learns her father had a secret past that she knew nothing about and that there is more to her father than meets the eye.

Movies.title: She's the Man
Movies.overview: When her brother decides to ditch school for a couple weeks, Viola heads over to his elite boarding school, disguised as him, and unexpectedly falls for one of his soccer teammates.

Movies.title: The Lost City of Z
Movies.overview: The Lost City of Z tells the incredible true story of British explorer Percy Fawcett, who journeys into the Amazon at the dawn of the 20th century and discovers evidence of a previously unknown, advanced civilization that may have once inhabited the region.

Movies.title: The Hunger Games: The Ballad of Songbirds & Snakes
Movies.overview: Coriolanus is the last hope for his failing lineage, the Snow family that has fallen from grace in a post-war Capitol. With his livelihood threatened, Snow is assigned to mentor Lucy Gray Baird, a tribute from the impoverished District 12.

Movies.title: Silverado
Movies.overview: In the 1800s Old West, an unlikely band of misfit friends teams up in a shoot-em-up against a frontier town’s crooked sheriff and his henchmen.

Movies.title: Saw X
Movies.overview: The chilling SAW X sees John Kramer seeking a cure for his cancer and finding con artists instead, making Jigsaw's game personal…and his ingenious traps more terrifying than ever.

Movies.title: PAW Patrol: Jet to the Rescue
Movies.overview: The Duke of Flappington takes the Princess' gem and uses its magical powers to raise Barkingburg into the sky! Skye will need to overcome her biggest fears and lead the team in their biggest aerial rescue yet! Get ready to JET TO THE RESCUE!

Movies.title: Battle: Los Angeles
Movies.overview: Marine staff sergeant (Aaron Eckhart) and his platoon take on an enemy unlike any they've ever encountered when hostile alien invaders attack the planet in this epic sci-fi action film.

Movies.title: Sniper: Legacy
Movies.overview: A rogue gunman is assassinating high-ranking military officers one by one. When Gunnery Sgt. Brandon Beckett (Chad Michael Collins, Sniper: Reloaded) is informed his father, legendary shooter Thomas Beckett (Tom Berenger) has been killed, Brandon springs into action to take out the perpetrator. But when his father rescues him from an ambush, Brandon realizes he’s a pawn being played by his...

Movies.title: Transformers One
Movies.overview: Witness the untold origin story of Orion Pax (young Optimus Prime) and D-16 (young Megatron). Once brothers-in-arms, see how they turn into sworn enemies and forever change the fate of Cybertron.

Movies.title: The Grinch
Movies.overview: The Grinch tells the story of a cynical grump who goes on a mission to steal Christmas, only to have his heart changed by a young girl's generous holiday spirit.

Movies.title: One More Shot
Movies.overview: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union Address.

Movies.title: Drive-Away Dolls
Movies.overview: Ethan Cohen directs this comedy where friends Jamie and Marian go on an impromptu road trip to Tallahassee for a fresh start. But things go south when they cross paths with a group of inept criminals along the way.

Movies.title: The Lego Batman Movie
Movies.overview: Batman works together with his sidekick, Robin, and the police commissioner's daughter, Barbara, to foil Joker's plans of taking over Gotham City.

Movies.title: The Book of Clarence
Movies.overview: Jerusalem, year 33. Pursuing a better life for himself and his family, Clarence (LaKeith Stanfield) decides to take advantage of the impact of Jesus Christ and become a new Messiah, risking everything along the way.

Movies.title: The 6th Day
Movies.overview: In the future, a corporation has begun illegally cloning humans. They mistakenly clone the wrong man, who is now the only one who could expose them.

Movies.title: Point Break
Movies.overview: A young FBI agent, Johnny Utah, infiltrates a team of thrill-seeking elite athletes – led by the charismatic Bodhi. Deep undercover, and with his life in danger, Utah strives to prove they are the architects of a string of inconceivable crimes.

Movies.title: RED
Movies.overview: Retired assassins are targeted for death in this comic action adventure.

Movies.title: 2 Hearts
Movies.overview: For two couples the future unfolds in different decades and different places, but a hidden connection will bring them together in a way no one could have predicted.

Movies.title: Frida
Movies.overview: Salma Hayek gives a passionate, Oscar®-nominated performance in this biographical drama about Mexican painter Frida Kahlo.

Movies.title: Two Days Before Christmas
Movies.overview: A writer, a pop star and their families weather snowstorms, mounting career crises and intertwining love lives across Quebec two days before Christmas.

Movies.title: Beverly Hills Cop
Movies.overview: The heat is on in this fast paced action-comedy starring Eddie Murphy as Axel Foley, a street smart Detroit cop tracking down his best friends killer in Beverly Hills.

Movies.title: Genie
Movies.overview: With his life unraveling around him, Bernard dusts off a jewelry box and unintentionally releases genie Flora, who might just be able to help him.
